textPlain: Amiga forever! Curation first. Two follow ups:1) An amiga museum with all the games, artwork, coding technology, music technology etc. Perhaps an AI can be tasked to produce this soon.2) AI coding might unlock mass creation of new software, games, demos, music etc. What was once conceived impossible will be very possible and likely abundant soon.Of course, this will be only possible with the dedication and efforts of enthusiasts. Thank you!!
